svg:
<svg id="010-random-access" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="按位查找 O(1)" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">按位查找 O(1)</text><text class="text small" x="24" y="64">根据位序直接定位数组位置。</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="112" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a1</text><text class="text tiny" x="112" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 0</text><rect class="box" x="154" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="196" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a2</text><text class="text tiny" x="196" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 1</text><rect class="box" x="238" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="280" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a3</text><text class="text tiny" x="280" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 2</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="246" y="89" width="68" height="6" rx="3"/><rect class="box" x="322" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="364" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a4</text><text class="text tiny" x="364" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 3</text><rect class="box" x="406" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="448" y="139" text-anchor="middle">a5</text><text class="text tiny" x="448" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 4</text><rect class="box" x="490" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="532" y="139" text-anchor="middle">...</text><text class="text tiny" x="532" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 5</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="70" y="81" width="36" height="8" rx="4"/><text class="text small" x="24" y="222">连续单元表示物理地址相邻，访问时按元素大小跳转。</text></svg>

<svg id="010-pointer-step" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="指针下标步长" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">指针下标步长</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="82" width="620" height="70" rx="10"/><text class="text" x="380" y="126" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22px" font-weight="700">LOC(ai)=LOC(a1)+(i-1)*sizeof(ElemType)</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 120 174 H 640"/><text class="text small" x="90" y="215">起始地址</text><text class="text small" x="310" y="215">位序 i</text><text class="text small" x="530" y="215">元素大小</text></svg>

<svg id="010-locate-flow" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="按值查找顺序扫描" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">按值查找顺序扫描</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="105" y="143" text-anchor="middle">找到目标返回位序</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 188 137 H 297"/><rect class="box" x="305" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="380" y="143" text-anchor="middle">找不到返回</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 463 137 H 572"/><rect class="box" x="580" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="655" y="143" text-anchor="middle">0</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>

<svg id="010-struct-compare" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="结构体比较" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">结构体比较</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">基本类型</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">可直接 ==</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">int/char/float</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">结构体类型</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">逐字段比较</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">按业务定义相等</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>
